items.title: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages
items.dek: The price of jet fuel most European airlines currently use has jumped by half since the start of the war.
items.body: The price of jet fuel most European airlines currently use has jumped by half since the start of the war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
items.dek: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.
items.body: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
items.dek: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.
items.body: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.
items.author: IriLine Desk
